steps.title: Identify the role of the underlined portion
steps.content: The key signal is the structure “This approach has some limits—[underlined text]—but the data set nonetheless...” The underlined text serves as the specific limitation being introduced by the word “limits.”

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content:
The underlined sentence identifies a concrete flaw in the data set: the Places API is restricted to customer-facing places only.

The other three choices misidentify what's being discussed or reverse the function from acknowledgment of limitation to something else.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
